reason: Human neurophysiological dataset with EEG recordings (resting-state, working-memory, TMS-EEG). Multiple brain stimulation sites (prefrontal cortex, premotor cortex, parietal cortex) with control condition. 123 subjects with cognitive behavioral data. EEG is an explicitly in-scope modality. Directly applicable to neuroscience, cognitive neuroscience, and neuromodulation research. Public, reusable OpenNeuro dataset suitable for student research.
